content:
# Gold Rewards Card Terms

## Eligibility Requirements
1. The applicant must have income of at least 80000.
2. The applicant must meet a minimum credit tier of good.
3. If either eligibility item is not known, collect that customer detail before positioning the Gold Rewards Card as available.

## Rates and Fees
| Attribute | Gold Rewards Card term |
|---|---|
| Annual fee | 0 |
| Purchase APR | 21.99 |
| Foreign transaction fee | 1.0 |
| Balance transfer intro period | 9 |

See "Credit Card Fee Apr Rewards Matrix" when comparing this card's pricing against other Northstar Bank cards.

## Rewards Profile
The Gold Rewards Card earns cashback at 2.0 for everyday purchases, 2.0 for groceries, 2.0 for dining, and 2.0 for travel. Sustainable purchases earn 1.5, and crypto purchases earn 0.75. Customers with Rho Bank Plus receive an additional 0.4 bonus where the program applies.

## Positioning Notes
Use the Gold Rewards Card for customers who meet the stated income and credit-tier requirements and want a broad rewards card across everyday, grocery, dining, and travel spend. For recommendation ordering across eligible cards, see "Internal: Credit Card Recommendation Policy".
title: Gold Rewards Card Terms
